rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO BUENO ET AL VS. HAWK LING LOU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANTS KETTY LOU, HAWK LOU, HAWK LOU and HAWK LOU's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE Hearing Required to address the number of times appearing Pro Hac Vice and discrepancy between verified application 3:2-3 and Sinton Declaration 2:25-26. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE and CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT's Motion To Strike Plaintiffs Second Amended Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts re: malice, oppression or fraud. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HARRIET SCHATZ ET AL VS. 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANTS 2415 BUCHANAN, LLC, CHARLES MOORE and CHARLES MOORE AS TRUSTEE OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is overruled re: Statute of Limitations as to causes of action 1-3. Delayed discovery is sufficiently alleged. As to the first cause of action demurer is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled re: CCP 366.2, cause of action against 2415 Buchanan is not barred by CCP 366.2. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to re-allege this cause of action as declaratory relief. As to the second cause of action demurer is overruled. Facts giving rise to individual liability are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VAN NGUYEN ET AL VS. BAU QUACH ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANTS BAU QUACH and HUNG TRAN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint GRANTED, November 8, 2015 sub-service is quashed. Request for CCP 128.7(c)(2) sanctions is denied without prejudice for Defendants to bring a motion under CC 128.7(c)(1). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. JENIFER EATON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Pltf'S Request For Admissions Set One On Def Masai Bradford And Request For Sanctions Against Def Masai Bradford In The Amount Of $1,135
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 4. PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY's Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Plaintiff's Request For Admissions Set One On Defendant Masai Bradford And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Masai Bradford In The Amount Of $1,135 GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $435. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISRAEL SHALOM VS. ELIZABETH LUJAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, April 06, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH LUJAN and DIEGO SILVA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. Notice fails to comply with SFRO 37.9B(c)(4), see SFRO 37.9(h). = (501/REQ)
